$comment: OPTIONAL — interactive Matriks MCP for the Claude Code agent (header-auth /mcp endpoint, the Cursor/Antigravity recipe per Matriks_MCP_Dokumani.pdf — NOT the /claude OAuth endpoint). The INGESTION adapter uses the REST API instead (Python can't call MCP tools). SAFE TO COMMIT: no literal secret. Claude Code expands ${VARS} from the shell env, NOT from .env — run `set -a && source .env && set +a` before `claude`, or use `claude mcp add` with literal --header values (see M0_TASKS.md T1).
